controls.label: Enable fail2ban brute force protection
controls.help: Turns on fail2ban brute force protection. This helps secure the site against Brute Force attacks.

mappings.UI-RISK-010-001:
# BEGIN VAPT RISK-010
[wordpress]
enabled = true
port = http,https
filter = wordpress-auth
logpath = /var/log/auth.log
maxretry = 3
# END VAPT RISK-010
